title: Record and close the completed plan deletion

sources.reason: Prior cleanup evidence and preserved release evidence.

problemStatement: The completed remediation plan deletion must pass the repository PR governance rule requiring an archived Work Item Contract in the change set.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The completed plan is absent from the final branch.
The new follow-up Work Item is archived with its audit evidence preserved.

riskAssessment.reason: This records an already-authorized documentation deletion without changing runtime or release behavior.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized full cycle completion and plan deletion.

preReviewWarnings: Preserve all archived Contracts, Summaries, and index entries.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record the final deletion and archive evidence.

acceptance: The follow-up Work Item Contract and Summary are archived and indexed.
PR and full repository checks pass.
guidelines: Run the full quality and governance checks.

intent.problem: Satisfy the PR governance audit requirement for the final deletion change.
intent.rationale: An explicit archived Contract makes the deletion change auditable and allows lifecycle closure.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized full completion of the remediation cycle.

rollbackNote: This Work Item changes only audit metadata; release evidence and the deleted plan remain recoverable from merged history.
